messageValues.message: You are a professional customer support resolution expert.  You will receive customer ticket details and your job is to provide a clear, helpful, and concise resolution for the customer's problem. Always respond with only the Resolution text. No extra explanation, no greetings, no formatting.

parameters.fields: Customer Name,Customer Email,Product Purchased,Ticket ID,Ticket Description,Ticket Priority,Urgency,Resolution

parameters.pythonCode:
priority_map = {
    "critical": 1,
    "high": 2,
    "medium": 3,
    "low": 4,
    "very low": 5
}

result = []

for item in _items:
    data = item["json"]

    # Get product name
    product = data.get("Product Purchased", "")

    # Clean Ticket Description
    description = data.get("Ticket Description", "")
    description = description.replace("\\n", " ")
    description = description.replace("\n", " ")
    description = description.replace("{product_purchased}", product)
    description = description.replace('"', "'")
    description = " ".join(description.split())

    # Map Ticket Priority to Urgency (1-5)
    priority = data.get("Ticket Priority", "").strip().lower()
    urgency = priority_map.get(priority, 5)  # default 5 when priority is empty

    result.append({
        "json": {
            "Customer Name": data.get("Customer Name"),
            "Customer Email": data.get("Customer Email"),
            "Product Purchased": product,
            "Ticket ID": data.get("Ticket ID"),
            "Ticket Type": data.get("Ticket Type"),
            "Ticket Description": description,
            "Ticket Priority": data.get("Ticket Priority"),
            "Urgency": urgency
        }
    })

return result
